resposta:
solution:
```
class Solution:
    def detectCapitalUse(self, word: str) -> bool:
        return word.isupper() or word.islower() or word.istitle()
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: This solution uses Python's built-in string methods to check if the word is all uppercase, all lowercase, or title case, which covers the three valid capitalization cases.
